title: Do Women Have a Higher Sex Drive?
original_title: Do Women Have a Higher Sex Drive?
overview: For years men have thought women had a lower sexdrive? Can men be proven wrong again? The film explores the the scientific, historical, biological and social aspects behind the female sex drive and female gaze.
